title: Mixer Initialization, Channels, Latency, Volume, Mute, and Cue Alternatives · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for mixer initialization, channels, latency, volume, mute, and cue alternatives and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, pygame-ce, SDL, display, input, audio, filesystem, packaging, GPU, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded accessible audio and cue system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Configure mixer frequency, format, channels, buffer, and initialization before loading sounds and record platform limits.
Reserve or prioritize channels for critical cues and define overlap, stealing, cooldown, and device-loss behavior.
Provide master and separate effects and music control, mute, remembered settings, and safe defaults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Mixer Init
steps.instruction:
Order the Mixer Init Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python player-input-to-release evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Mixer Init.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Mixer Init assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Mixer Init, keep Mixer Init connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.text: A quiz Asteroids team handles case 5324 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to own mixer initialization, channel budgets, latency, volume and mute controls, and non-audio alternatives for every critical cue; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Configure mixer frequency, format, channels, buffer, and initialization before loading sounds and record platform limits.

hints: For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Audio Failure, name the player, revision, runtime, seed, input, time, coordinate, state, entity, collision, render, cue, accessibility, package, release, and desktop-transfer boundary, Audio Failure precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Audio Failure, trace this concrete input and predict event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, accessibility, failure, pause, rollback, recovery, and desktop evidence before reviewing it: A quiz Asteroids team handles case 9185 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to own mixer initialization, channel budgets, latency, volume and mute controls, and non-audio alternatives for every critical cue; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Continue play with missing files, unavailable mixer, device change, interruption, or mute while preserving diagnostics.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Audio Failure
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Audio Failure: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 7566 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to own mixer initialization, channel budgets, latency, volume and mute controls, and non-audio alternatives for every critical cue; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Continue play with missing files, unavailable mixer, device change, interruption, or mute while preserving diagnostics.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Continue play with missing files, unavailable mixer, device change, interruption, or mute while preserving diagnostics.
